ogTitle: Moondarra vs Moonlight Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moondarra and Moonlight Flat.
heading: Moondarra vs Moonlight Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moondarra, Victoria and Moonlight Flat, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonlight Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Moondarra (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moondarra or Moonlight Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moondarra has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Moonlight Flat scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moondarra scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Moonlight Flat scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moondarra or Moonlight Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonlight Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
